Minimum reload value online is Rs.50/- to Rs.50,000/-.
This gift card is redeemable at all Lifestyle stores subject to exceptions in Clause 4.
For list of Stores click here http://lifestylestores.com/#storelocater_section.
This Gift Card cannot be used at Cafes/Food Courts within Lifestyle. This Gift Card cannot be used for purchase of electronic goods and any jewellery.
This Gift Card is valid for a period of 365 Days from the date of purchase
The Gift Card is redeemable at all Lifestyle and Home Centre Stores within India.
The Gift Card cannot be exchanged for cash.
The card cannot be redeemed on purchase of any jewellery.
No replacement / compensation is permissible/payable for lost Gift Cards.
Mutilated or defaced Gift card/s will not be honoured.
Lifestyle reserves the right to alter any /all the terms and conditions of this Gift Card any time without prior notice. Any dispute shall be referred to Lifestyle International Pvt. Ltd. (the Company) and the decision of the Company shall be final.
All disputes are subject to Bangalore Jurisdiction.
For balance enquiry and expiry sms LSBAL< space><16 digit card number> to 56767 or visit any Lifestyle store."},"categories":["4","8","282","402"],"themes":[],"customThemesAvailable":false,"handlingCharges":[],"reloadCardNumber":false,"expiry":"1 year","formatExpiry":null,"couponcodeDesc":null,"discounts":[],"corporateDiscounts":null,"relatedProducts":[],"storeLocatorUrl":null,"brandName":"Lifestyle","brandCode":"Lifestyle","brandLogo":"https://d1ssr5uvl3uuv0.cloudfront.net/uat-woohoo/woohoo/woohoo-card/brands/2b4817b0-71df-4858-af65-10312a4a7584.png","etaMessage":"3-7","createdAt":"2015-11-01T22:07:26+00:00","updatedAt":"2022-09-14T15:22:24+00:00","cpg":{"barcode":{"encoding":null},"redemptionTerms":[],"type":"clp","code":"GBV2LSRC003-","issuerName":"","erupi_purpose":null,"erupi_payer_type":null,"erupi_payee_type":null,"erupi_recurrence_pattern":null,"erupi_validity":null},"payout":{"enabled":true,"payment_methods":["svc"],"account_types":["BANK_ACCOUNT","UPI","TELEPHONE"],"transaction_types":["IMPS","NEFT","UPI"],"maximum_beneficiaries":"1","validate_terms_and_condition":"I accept TnCs","validation":{"amount":"1","edit_beneficiary":true,"convenience_charge":"","vpa_penny_drop_required":true}},"convenience_charges":[],"allowedfulfillments":[{"code":false}],"rewardsDescription":null,"travelPass":[],"addCardToWallet":false,"orderModes":[],"emiApplicable":false,"emiApplicableMessage":"","upc":{"id":"5"},"campaigns":null,"redemption_rules":[]}
